view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior when running a consolidated report for multiple clients. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. As such, it is not possible to determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report.
